name: Samus Aran
description: Samus Aran is an intergalactic bounty hunter and the main protagonist of the Metroid series. The daughter of Rodney Aran and Virginia Aran, she lost her parents during a Space Pirate raid on her home of K-2L. Later, Samus was adopted by the mysterious Chozo and taken to Zebes, where she was infused with their DNA and raised to become a warrior.
creator: LuckInItsWorst
